title: Moroccan Lamb Tagine
description: A traditional Moroccan stew made with tender lamb, aromatic spices, and dried fruits. Perfect for a hearty dinner.
instructions: Season the lamb with salt and black pepper.
Heat oil in a large clay pot or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onions and cook until they are softened and lightly browned.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cumin, cinnamon, and paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb and cook until it is browned on all sides.
Add the dried apricots and prunes, and stir to combine.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the oven.
Braise the tagine for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs.
